queries.question: Tell me services each property management company provides.
queries.sql: SELECT Services.service_name  from Property_Management_Companies_Services join Services on Property_Management_Companies_Services.service_id = Services.id join Property_Management_Companies on Property_Management_Companies_Services.company_id = Property_Management_Companies.id   GROUP BY Property_Management_Companies_Services.service_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Property_Management_Companies_Services.company_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Property_Management_Companies)

queries.question: Tell me services each property management company provides.
queries.sql: select property_management_companies.name , services.service_name from Property_Management_Companies_Services join Services on Property_Management_Companies_Services.service_id = Services.id join Property_Management_Companies on Property_Management_Companies_Services.company_id = Property_Management_Companies.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?service_name WHERE {
  ?property_management_companies_services a :Property_Management_Companies_Services .
  ?services a :Services .
  ?property_management_companies_services p:hasServices ?services .
  ?property_management_companies a :Property_Management_Companies .
  ?property_management_companies_services p:hasProperty_Management_Companies ?property_management_companies .
  ?property_management_companies p:name ?name .
  ?services p:service_name ?service_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Tell me services each property management company provides.
